channel.title: PharmD Physical Assessment Audio Course
channel.description: Hands-free study course for Physical Assessment for Pharmacist Clinicians. Each episode covers learning objectives, core content, drug-related pearls, red flags, and an audio quiz with pause-and-answer pacing.
channel.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher
channel.itunes:summary: Hands-free study course for Physical Assessment for Pharmacist Clinicians. Each episode covers learning objectives, core content, drug-related pearls, red flags, and an audio quiz with pause-and-answer pacing.

item.title: Ep 01: Foundations of Pharmacist-Led Physical Assessment
item.description: Clinical reasoning, scope of practice, the four exam techniques, and the SOAP note. Your foundation for everything that follows.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 02: Vital Signs and the General Survey
item.description: Blood pressure technique, orthostatic measurements, heart rate, respiratory rate, pulse oximetry, temperature, pain, and the thirty-second general survey.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 03: Skin, Hair, and Nails: The Adverse Drug Reaction Detector
item.description: Lesion morphology, drug eruption patterns, SJS/TEN versus DRESS versus AGEP, hair loss patterns, and nail findings that signal systemic disease.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 04: HEENT: Head, Eyes, Ears, Nose, and Throat
item.description: Pupillary exam, visual acuity, basic fundoscopy, otoscopy, oral and oropharyngeal exam, and thyroid palpation. Drug findings throughout.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 05: The Respiratory Exam
item.description: Inspection patterns of work of breathing, percussion of the lung fields, the three abnormal breath sounds, and pharmacist-focused exam of the asthmatic and COPD patient.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 06: The Cardiovascular Exam
item.description: Heart sounds S1 through S4, the auscultation areas, the four classic murmurs, jugular venous pressure, edema, and drug-related cardiac findings.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 07: Peripheral Vascular and Lymphatic Assessment
item.description: Pulses, ankle-brachial index, venous and arterial insufficiency, lymph node patterns, and the exam for DVT in anticoagulation patients.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 08: The Abdominal Exam
item.description: Inspection, the auscultation-first sequence, percussion of liver and spleen, palpation patterns, and drug-induced GI findings.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 09: The Musculoskeletal Exam
item.description: Range of motion, joint inspection and palpation, gait analysis, and drug-induced musculoskeletal findings: statin myopathy, fluoroquinolone tendinopathy, and steroid complications.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 10: The Neurologic Exam
item.description: Mental status, cranial nerves I through XII, motor and sensory exam, deep tendon reflexes, coordination, and drug-induced neurologic findings.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 11: Endocrine Physical Findings
item.description: Thyroid exam, diabetes-related physical findings including the diabetic foot exam, signs of Cushing's syndrome and adrenal insufficiency, and drug-induced endocrine syndromes.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 12: Genitourinary Considerations for Pharmacists
item.description: Costovertebral angle tenderness, bladder assessment, prostate-relevant symptom review, BPH and incontinence considerations, and drug-induced urinary findings.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 13: Geriatric and Pediatric Assessment Variations
item.description: Frailty assessment, polypharmacy red flags, falls evaluation, pediatric vital ranges, growth charts, and developmental milestones relevant to pharmacist practice.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher

item.title: Ep 14: Integration and Board-Style Review
item.description: Focused assessment templates for common ambulatory pharmacist visits, plus 20 board-style review questions read aloud with rationales.
item.itunes:author: Joshua Belcher
